info.title: Tradie Migration App API
info.description: Prototype API for the Tradie Migration App. Supports candidate onboarding, employer search, EOI submission, visa case management, electrical worker scoring, and RAG Q&A.

get.description:
Returns high-level stats for the admin dashboard homepage.
Used by: Company Admin, Migration Agent, Admin roles.
Returns recently updated visa applications for the case queue.
Returns employers awaiting admin verification.
Return all employer companies awaiting admin verification.

post.description: Approve or reject an employer company registration.

get.description: Return all employer companies with their verification status.
Alias for /employers — return all employer companies.
Return all candidate profiles (published and unpublished).
Return a single candidate profile by ID.

delete.description: Permanently delete a candidate profile (admin only).

get.description: Return all registered users.
Return a single employer company by ID.

delete.description: Permanently delete an employer company (admin only).

put.description: Activate or deactivate a user account.

get.description: Return the authenticated candidate's own profile.

post.description: Create a candidate profile for the authenticated user.

delete.description: Permanently delete the authenticated candidate's profile.

post.description: Publish the candidate's profile so employers can discover them.

get.description: Return all EOIs received by the authenticated candidate.
Return the authenticated employer's company profile.

post.description: Register an employer company. Starts in 'pending' verification status.

delete.description: Delete the authenticated employer's company profile.

get.description: Search published candidate profiles with optional filters.
View a single published candidate profile.

post.description: Submit an Expression of Interest to a published candidate.
Create a new visa application case for a candidate.

get.description: List all visa applications, with optional filters.
Get a single visa application by ID.

put.description: Update fields of an existing visa application.
Update the status and/or notes of a visa application.

post.description: Submit an Expression of Interest to a published candidate.

get.description: Return all EOIs received by the authenticated candidate.
Get a specific EOI.

put.description: Update an EOI before it is read by the candidate.

post.description: Trigger or re-run electrical worker scoring for a candidate.

get.description: View the stored electrical worker score and breakdown for a candidate.

delete.description: Delete a candidate's electrical worker score.

get.description: Return all active training providers.
Return a single active training provider.

post.description: Publish a new course (electrical only in MVP).

get.description: Return all published courses, optionally filtered by trade category.
Return a single course.

post.description: Link a training course recommendation to a candidate.

get.description: Return all courses recommended to a specific candidate.

post.description:
Ask a natural-language question about a specific candidate's uploaded documents.

The system retrieves the most relevant document chunks using pgvector cosine
similarity and passes them as context to Bedrock Claude to generate a grounded answer.

- If no documents have been ingested, returns status='no_documents'.
- In local/dev mode (USE_STUB_EMBEDDINGS=true), returns a stub answer.

Ingest an uploaded document for a candidate into the RAG vector store.

Pipeline:
  1. Extract text from the file (PDF or DOCX).
  2. Split into overlapping chunks.
  3. Embed each chunk with AWS Bedrock Titan.
  4. Store TextChunk rows in Postgres / pgvector.

Args (path params):
  candidate_id: UUID of the CandidateProfile.
  document_id:  UUID of an existing ApplicantDocument record.

Body: multipart/form-data with a 'file' field (.pdf or .docx).

get.description:
List stored text chunks for a candidate (for inspection / debugging).
Shows chunk text (truncated to 300 chars) and whether an embedding exists.
Quick liveness probe.
